allow: PowerShell(wsl bash -c "cd /home/bram/essiell_project && nohup python3 -m http.server 8765 > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 & sleep 1 && cat /tmp/server.log; echo STARTED")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/index.html" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })
PowerShell(wsl bash -c "pkill -f 'http.server 8765'; sleep 1; cd /home/bram/essiell_project && nohup python3 server.py > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 & sleep 1 && cat /tmp/server.log")
PowerShell(wsl bash -c "cat /tmp/server.log; echo '---'; ps aux | grep server.py")
PowerShell(wsl bash -c "cd /home/bram/essiell_project && nohup python3 server.py > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 1; cat /tmp/server.log")
PowerShell(wsl bash -c "ps aux | grep server.py | grep -v grep; echo '---log---'; cat /tmp/server.log")
PowerShell(wsl bash -c "fuser -k 8765/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /home/bram/essiell_project && nohup python3 server.py > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 1; echo done")
